description: Comprehensive vehicle control system for managing engine operations, climate control, door locks, lighting, braking systems, cruise control, tire monitoring, and navigation features.

tools.name: get_engine_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current operational status of the vehicle engine, including running state, fuel level, and battery voltage.

engine_state.description: The current operational state of the vehicle engine.

fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank, measured in gallons.

battery_voltage.description: The current electrical voltage of the vehicle battery, measured in volts.

tools.name: start_engine
tools.description: Start the vehicle engine. This operation requires all doors to be locked and the brake pedal to be fully pressed as safety prerequisites.

engine_state.description: The current operational state of the vehicle engine.

fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank, measured in gallons.

battery_voltage.description: The current electrical voltage of the vehicle battery, measured in volts.

error.description: Error message if prerequisites (locked doors and pressed brake pedal) are not met.

tools.name: stop_engine
tools.description: Stop the vehicle engine and transition it to a stopped state.

engine_state.description: The current operational state of the vehicle engine.

fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank, measured in gallons.

battery_voltage.description: The current electrical voltage of the vehicle battery, measured in volts.

tools.name: get_fuel_level
tools.description: Retrieve the current fuel level in the vehicle tank.

fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank, measured in gallons (range: 0-50).

tools.name: fill_fuel_tank
tools.description: Add a specified amount of fuel to the vehicle tank. The tank has a maximum capacity of 50 gallons.

fuel_amount.description: The amount of fuel to add to the tank, measured in gallons. Must be positive and the total fuel level must not exceed 50 gallons.

fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank after filling, measured in gallons.

error.description: Error message if the fuel amount is invalid or would exceed the 50-gallon tank capacity.

tools.name: estimate_drive_feasibility
tools.description: Estimate whether the vehicle has sufficient fuel to complete a specified distance based on current fuel level and fuel efficiency.

distance.description: The distance to travel for which feasibility is being estimated.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the distance. Defaults to 'miles' if not specified.

can_drive.description: Indicates whether the vehicle has sufficient fuel to complete the specified distance.

current_fuel_level.description: The current amount of fuel in the vehicle tank, measured in gallons.

estimated_range.description: The estimated maximum distance the vehicle can travel with current fuel, measured in the specified unit.

tools.name: get_door_status
tools.description: Retrieve the lock status of vehicle doors, either for a specific door or all doors.

door_position.description: The specific door position to query. If not provided, returns status for all doors.

door_status.description: A mapping of door positions to their current lock status (locked or unlocked).

remaining_unlocked_doors.description: The count of doors that are currently in an unlocked state.

tools.name: lock_doors
tools.description: Lock one or more vehicle doors at specified positions.

door_positions.description: List of door positions to lock. Valid positions are driver, passenger, rear_left, and rear_right.

lock_status.description: Confirmation that the specified doors have been locked.

door_status.description: A mapping of door positions to their updated lock status after the operation.

remaining_unlocked_doors.description: The count of doors that are currently in an unlocked state.

tools.name: unlock_doors
tools.description: Unlock one or more vehicle doors at specified positions.

door_positions.description: List of door positions to unlock. Valid positions are driver, passenger, rear_left, and rear_right.

lock_status.description: Confirmation that the specified doors have been unlocked.

door_status.description: A mapping of door positions to their updated lock status after the operation.

remaining_unlocked_doors.description: The count of doors that are currently in an unlocked state.

tools.name: get_climate_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current climate control settings and environmental status inside the vehicle.

temperature.description: The current target temperature setting for the climate control system, measured in Celsius.

fan_speed.description: The current fan speed setting, ranging from 0 (off) to 100 (maximum).

mode.description: The current operational mode of the climate control system.

humidity_level.description: The current humidity level inside the vehicle cabin, expressed as a percentage.

tools.name: set_climate_control
tools.description: Adjust the climate control settings of the vehicle, including temperature, fan speed, and operational mode.

temperature.description: The target temperature to set for the climate control system.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the temperature. Defaults to 'celsius' if not specified.

fan_speed.description: The fan speed to set, ranging from 0 (off) to 100 (maximum). If not provided, the current setting is maintained.

mode.description: The operational mode to set for the climate control system. If not provided, the current mode is maintained.

current_temperature.description: The current target temperature setting for the climate control system, measured in Celsius.

climate_mode.description: The current operational mode of the climate control system.

fan_speed.description: The current fan speed setting, ranging from 0 (off) to 100 (maximum).

humidity_level.description: The current humidity level inside the vehicle cabin, expressed as a percentage.

tools.name: get_outside_temperature
tools.description: Retrieve the current outside ambient temperature from the weather service.

outside_temperature.description: The current ambient temperature outside the vehicle, measured in Celsius.

tools.name: get_headlight_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current operational status of the vehicle headlights.

headlight_status.description: The current operational mode of the vehicle headlights.

tools.name: set_headlights
tools.description: Set the operational mode of the vehicle headlights.

mode.description: The operational mode to set for the vehicle headlights. Options are on (always on), off (always off), or auto (automatic based on ambient light).

headlight_status.description: The current operational mode of the vehicle headlights.

tools.name: get_brake_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current status of both the parking brake and brake pedal, including engagement state and applied force.

parking_brake_status.description: The current engagement state of the parking brake.

parking_brake_force.description: The current force applied by the parking brake, measured in Newtons.

slope_angle.description: The current angle of the vehicle's slope or incline, measured in degrees.

brake_pedal_status.description: The current state of the brake pedal indicating whether it is pressed or released.

brake_pedal_force.description: The current force applied to the brake pedal, measured in Newtons.

tools.name: set_parking_brake
tools.description: Engage or release the parking brake.

action.description: The action to perform on the parking brake. Use 'engage' to activate or 'release' to deactivate.

parking_brake_status.description: The current engagement state of the parking brake.

parking_brake_force.description: The current force applied by the parking brake, measured in Newtons.

slope_angle.description: The current angle of the vehicle's slope or incline, measured in degrees.

tools.name: press_brake_pedal
tools.description: Press the brake pedal to a specified position. The pedal will remain at this position until explicitly released.

pedal_position.description: The position to press the brake pedal to, ranging from 0 (not pressed) to 1 (fully pressed).

brake_pedal_status.description: The current state of the brake pedal indicating whether it is pressed or released.

brake_pedal_force.description: The current force applied to the brake pedal, measured in Newtons.

error.description: Error message if the pedal position is invalid (not between 0 and 1).

tools.name: release_brake_pedal
tools.description: Release the brake pedal completely, returning it to the unpressed position.

brake_pedal_status.description: The current state of the brake pedal indicating whether it is pressed or released.

brake_pedal_force.description: The current force applied to the brake pedal, measured in Newtons. Should be 0.0 when released.

tools.name: get_cruise_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current status of the cruise control system, including activation state and target speed.

cruise_status.description: The current activation state of the cruise control system.

current_speed.description: The current speed of the vehicle, measured in kilometers per hour (km/h).

distance_to_next_vehicle.description: The distance to the next vehicle ahead, measured in meters.

tools.name: set_cruise_control
tools.description: Activate or deactivate cruise control with a specified target speed. The engine must be running to activate cruise control.

speed.description: The target speed to set for cruise control, measured in kilometers per hour (km/h). Must be between 0 and 120 and a multiple of 5 when activating.

activate.description: Set to true to activate cruise control, or false to deactivate it.

distance_to_next_vehicle.description: The distance to maintain from the next vehicle ahead, measured in meters. Required when activating cruise control.

cruise_status.description: The current activation state of the cruise control system.

current_speed.description: The current speed of the vehicle, measured in kilometers per hour (km/h).

distance_to_next_vehicle.description: The distance to the next vehicle ahead, measured in meters.

error.description: Error message if the engine is stopped or the speed is invalid (not between 0-120 or not a multiple of 5).

tools.name: get_current_speed
tools.description: Retrieve the current speed of the vehicle.

current_speed.description: The current speed of the vehicle, measured in kilometers per hour (km/h).

tools.name: get_tire_pressure
tools.description: Retrieve the tire pressure for a specific tire or all tires, along with health status.

tire_position.description: The specific tire position to query. If not provided, returns pressure for all tires.

tire_pressure.description: A mapping of tire positions to their current pressure values, measured in PSI.

healthy_tire_pressure.description: Indicates whether all tires are within the healthy pressure range (30-35 PSI average).

tools.name: check_tire_pressure
tools.description: Check the pressure of all tires and determine if maintenance is needed based on healthy pressure ranges.

front_left_tire_pressure.description: The current pressure of the front left tire, measured in PSI.

front_right_tire_pressure.description: The current pressure of the front right tire, measured in PSI.

rear_left_tire_pressure.description: The current pressure of the rear left tire, measured in PSI.

rear_right_tire_pressure.description: The current pressure of the rear right tire, measured in PSI.

healthy_tire_pressure.description: Indicates whether all tires are within the healthy pressure range (30-35 PSI average).

tools.name: find_nearest_tire_shop
tools.description: Locate the nearest tire shop for maintenance or repair services.

shop_location.description: The address of the nearest tire shop available for maintenance services.

tools.name: get_navigation_status
tools.description: Retrieve the current navigation destination and activation status.

destination.description: The current destination address set in the navigation system.

navigation_status.description: Indicates whether the navigation system is currently active and providing directions.

tools.name: set_navigation_destination
tools.description: Set a destination address for the navigation system and activate navigation guidance.

destination.description: The destination address to navigate to, in the format 'street, city, state' or similar standard address format.
The current destination address set in the navigation system.

navigation_status.description: Indicates whether the navigation system is currently active and providing directions.

tools.name: convert_liter_to_gallon
tools.description: Convert a volume measurement from liters to gallons.

liters.description: The volume in liters to convert to gallons.

gallons.description: The converted volume measurement in gallons.

tools.name: convert_gallon_to_liter
tools.description: Convert a volume measurement from gallons to liters.

gallons.description: The volume in gallons to convert to liters.

liters.description: The converted volume measurement in liters.

tools.name: get_city_zipcode
tools.description: Retrieve the zipcode for a specified city name. Returns '00000' if the city is not found in the database.

city_name.description: The name of the city for which to retrieve the zipcode.

city_zipcode.description: The zipcode of the specified city.

tools.name: estimate_distance_between_cities
tools.description: Estimate the driving distance between two cities using their zipcodes, including intermediary cities along the route.

city_a_zipcode.description: The zipcode of the first city.

city_b_zipcode.description: The zipcode of the second city.

distance.description: The estimated driving distance between the two cities, measured in kilometers.

intermediary_cities.description: Optional list of cities along the route between the two specified cities.

error.description: Error message if the distance is not found in the database for the specified zipcodes.
